name: Mangalyaan (Mars Orbiter Mission)
fact: ISRO's first interplanetary mission, on a budget of ~$74M — less than the Hollywood film *Gravity*. India became the first Asian nation to reach Mars, and the first country to do so on a maiden interplanetary attempt. Operated 8 years (designed for 6 months) before contact was lost in April 2022.
capability: Demonstrated low-cost interplanetary missions; first Asian Mars mission.
